header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Organizational Development professional who thrives on translating people problems into structured programs, managing cross-functional execution from charter to delivery, and using data to measure and improve people initiatives. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve people experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

Design a year-round engagement & communications plan and recommend {prog|programs}, targeting 5%+ absenteeism reduction
Manage end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ {prog|programs}, utilizing {data|feedback loops} to optimize operational strategies and vendor performance
Establish {cross|cross-functional} processes and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders} to identify learning gaps and design 3 new {prog|programs}
Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting {prog|program} engagement and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations

Streamlined onboarding processes across 3 global locations by conducting gap analyses and clarifying job responsibilities
Delivered strategic HR solutions for business priorities across projects in employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
